children.text: the agency or person alleged to be engaging in violations under the Agreement;
the member agencies of the interagency trade organization established under ;section 1872(a) of this title
appropriate representatives referred to in .section 2547 of this title

children.heading: Resolution
children.label: b Resolution
children.text: The Trade Representative shall undertake to resolve, on a mutually satisfactory basis, the issues set forth in the representation through consultation with the parties concerned.
